title: Simple Wrench
description: Easy Destroy Block With Right Click! But, Is It Better Than a Pickaxe ?
body:
![simple wrench](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/221ca77602b00e5a0b8ff5d5d7b1db49ea117c55.png)
**Simple Wrench Mod** – A lightweight utility mod that adds a handy wrench tool. With a simple right‑click, you can instantly remove blocks without breaking them manually, making building adjustments and quick block removal effortless. Perfect for builders who want speed and convenience! 
![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)
![recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f853ff9bf76bf9d4b9d47ae1a119c64ed9c4269c.png)

![diamonds](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/13906da32d6d6397375a08f4427d781fbcafe558.jpeg)

This mod is fully compatible with other mods.

Note: Does **not** work with ( silk touch ) or ( fortune ) its a item not a pickaxe!

![intelij](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2f981cdb0f9bd8d718bf44ee4eb86d402e673891.png)

This mod have been created with IntelliJ

#AD
